note: Takes redfin_metro_sold_pivoted or zori_pivoted. Full monthly series by metro; brains publish point values, not series.
YoY home-value momentum by city — needs the whole series to compute the curve.
Luxury vs starter indexed to 100 at 2019-01 — an index needs every point since the base period.
Luxury vs starter YoY % change series.
Market-temperature dial = median per-ZIP hotness, a POINT value. market-temperature-swfl holds a 54-row per-ZIP snapshot. Repoint with the raw query kept as an outage fallback.
Trailing-13-month ZIP x month heatmap — inherently a series, and at a grain no brain publishes.
Monthly passengers plus a 12-month rolling average. rsw-airport holds point metrics only, no series.
Not lake data at all — a user-saved chart record fetched by id. No brain could hold it.
Asking rent $/sqft ranked by submarket. corridor-pulse-swfl publishes signal_* metrics only, no per-submarket rent table. Already falls back to fixtures/corridor-rents.json on error.

Per-corridor character chart blocks. No brain publishes this table. Note this same file ALREADY reads env-swfl.md from disk for flood AAL — the correct pattern, just via its own fs.readFile rather than lib/fetch-brain.ts.
Metro trend series; defaults to zhvi_pivoted.
YoY home-value momentum series.
Tier gap, indexed series.
Tier gap, YoY series.
RSW passenger volume series.
Daily listing-event counts. Daily grain is finer than any brain's rebuild cadence.
Desk price trend lane 1 — daily asking-price series.

3-metro monthly trend; zhvi_pivoted or zori_pivoted. Callers live outside the guarded dirs (app/insiders, app/r/zip-report, app/r/housing-swfl).
Daily median asking price per city plus the 30-year mortgage rate — a daily series.
Monthly closed-sale median and months-of-supply per city. Paged via selectAllPaged.
STRONGEST match. Brain publishes active_listings_count_swfl and median_list_price_swfl plus a 4-row county and 58-row ZIP table, and was rebuilt 07/20/2026 — as fresh as the raw view. Repoint first.
Exact concept match: brain publishes price_reduced_share_swfl and new_listing_share_swfl with a 54-row per-ZIP table. Check the 07/14 as-of against the tile's freshness claim before repointing.
The Daily Pulse — daily listing-event counts. Genuinely new data; this is what the lake is for.
Active-listing count per flag. Fires THREE times (new_construction, pending, foreclosure) — a dedupe/caching target independent of any brain question.
Six newest SWFL headlines. news-swfl publishes 9 metrics but no headline rows.
Largest active price cuts, flash feed. Per-listing rows; no brain holds listing-level detail.
Eight most recent sold transitions.
Second hop of the sold feed — address and list-price enrichment for the ids from line 489.
Same point value as app/charts/page.tsx:148 — median per-ZIP hotness for the temperature gauge. Brain holds a 54-row per-ZIP snapshot as of 07/19/2026.

Affordability histogram at region grain. Brain publishes entry_level / midmarket / upper_tier / luxury listing shares at region level as of 07/17/2026. Verify the band cutpoints match before repointing — the brain's tables are county grain.
